pages.text: Wood, flint, slime, resin and coral never melt — they get $(l)cut$().$(br2)Right-click the press with your input (logs, flint, slime balls, resin clumps, coral blocks), and right-click the frame to cycle which part shape it cuts.
pages.title: Parts Without Melting

pages.text: A $(l)redstone pulse$() drives the press down and cuts the input into the selected part. Hoppers feed inputs and collect outputs while the press is open — a redstone clock turns it into a part factory.$(br2)Early game this is your only source of handles and binders: wood first, metal later.
pages.title: Automation
